summary: Iter 35 — HR Onboarding Engine. Backend: 18/18 pytest passing (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE, PDF download + regenerate, RBAC, duplicate guard, prorated maths, dept templates, cascade delete). Frontend: full create→drawer→status-change→cascade-delete e2e verified via Playwright. Fixed two real bugs along the way (see below).

bugs_fixed_during_test.issue: Route ordering bug — GET /api/hr/onboarding/templates was being swallowed by GET /api/hr/onboarding/{rid}, returning 404 'Onboarding record not found'.
bugs_fixed_during_test.fix: Added a literal /templates handler BEFORE the {rid} route. Original handler renamed to /templates_full to avoid duplication and keep diff small.
bugs_fixed_during_test.rca: FastAPI matches routes in registration order; path-param routes will swallow literal sibling paths unless the literal is declared first.

bugs_fixed_during_test.issue: New-hire create flow returned HTTP 422 whenever the optional Reporting-manager / Mentor email fields were left blank. Pydantic Optional[EmailStr] rejects empty strings; frontend was always sending '' for those fields. This blocked the entire FE Create flow.
bugs_fixed_during_test.fix: Strip empty manager_email / mentor_email from the payload before POST so backend sees them as absent (default null).
bugs_fixed_during_test.rca: form state initialised those keys to '' and they were posted as-is. EmailStr disallows empty string.

playwright_flow_verified: Live prorated preview: '₹49,355 · 17 of 31 days in the start month.' for 90000@2026-07-15 ✓
Save → toast, dialog closes, card appears with KICKOFF pill, ₹49,355 chip, Tasks=6, Offer-letter download link
Card click → onb-detail drawer with 6 tasks in onb-detail-tasks
onb-set-status-docs_pending → card pill updates to DOCS_PENDING after closing drawer
onb-detail-delete → cascade-removes record + 6 tasks; card disappears
Other HR tabs (Regulations, Leave, Payslips) still clickable and load without errors
action_items: (Optional) Consider also using FastAPI APIRoute path matching tests to catch future route-ordering regressions in onboarding/.
(Optional) On the FE, normalise other future Optional[EmailStr] fields the same way — extract a tiny helper instead of inline deletes if more such forms appear.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering inside register_onboarding(): literal routes must be declared before path-param siblings. Now fixed for /templates, but worth a one-time audit if more literal paths are added.

Pydantic Optional[EmailStr] is unforgiving with empty strings — recommend a thin pre-validator (allow '' → None) on the backend model to harden against any other UI form that may POST empty optional emails. Currently masked by FE-side delete.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_QA_* onboarding rows, but every test path cleans them up; final DB state is 0 onboarding_records (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Onboarding endpoints live under /api/hr/onboarding (+ /templates and /{rid}/offer-letter.pdf, /{rid}/regenerate-offer-letter). FE entry: /app/hr → [data-testid=hr-tab-onboarding]. Two bugs were fixed by this testing pass (FastAPI route ordering & FE empty EmailStr) — main agent should self-validate the diffs.
rca of the issue: Both issues described under bugs_fixed_during_test with file, root cause and applied fix.
